GESTURE_OPEN_PALM.label: Minimize JARVIS
GESTURE_OPEN_PALM.description: Open palm minimizes the Electron shell to the tray

GESTURE_FIST.label: Toggle Bento Launcher
GESTURE_FIST.description: Closed fist triggers the application grid

GESTURE_SWIPE_LEFT.label: Previous Panel
GESTURE_SWIPE_LEFT.description: Swipe left to cycle backward through HUD modules

GESTURE_SWIPE_RIGHT.label: Next Panel
GESTURE_SWIPE_RIGHT.description: Swipe right to cycle forward through HUD modules

GESTURE_THUMBS_UP.label: Confirm / Dismiss Notification
GESTURE_THUMBS_UP.description: Thumbs up to acknowledge the current alert
